channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The stock market is reflecting fears of an AI apocalypse for white-collar jobs
Trump trade adviser Navarro says administration may force data center builders like Meta to 'internalize' costs
item.description: Data centers powering artificial intelligence have strained the electrical grid and driven utility costs higher for consumers.

item.title: Here are 7 charts guaranteed to stress you out about the stock market
Tax refunds are up this year, early IRS numbers show. See how yours compares.
What's next for Cuba? Trump turns the screws as the island runs out of jet fuel
item.description: Cuba’s government appears to be on the brink of economic collapse amid a worsening energy crisis.

item.title: These ‘safer’ chip stocks have boomed this year. Is it too late to buy in?
How a riptide around AI and stocks could affect Fed decisions and housing market
U.S. and European interests are 'intertwined,' Secretary of State Rubio says
item.description: Speaking at the Munich Security Conference, the U.S. secretary of State stressed the importance of cooperation with Europe.

item.title: Epstein files: LA28 chief Wasserman puts his talent agency up for sale after Maxwell revelations, WSJ reports
item.description: Casey Wasserman told his firm's staff that he felt that he had "become ‌a distraction" to its work and had begun the process of selling the company.

item.title: Trump says he will issue executive order to get voter-ID requirements before midterms
item.description: President Donald Trump proclaims that he will find a way to implement national voter-ID requirements by November's elections.
